name: EMX Royalty Corp.
description: EMX Royalty Corp. is a precious, base, and battery metals royalty company. EMX's business model is designed to provide investors with exposure to discovery and commodity price optionality, while limiting exposure to the risks and capital requirements of mining operations. The company's diversified portfolio of royalty, mineral property, and investment assets spans across North America, Europe, Turkey, Latin America, and Australia. EMX generates revenue through royalty interests, pre-production payments, and property sales, while continuously acquiring new mineral properties to build its royalty pipeline.
